w:r.w:t: Head of Products & AI | Management | TECH
My favourite management paradox is, that it is all about setting employees free so their potential can unfold, within well-defined borders, so success can be measured and acknowledged
CHOOSE STRATEGIC THINKING WITH A HIGH DRIVE FOR EXECUTION

Business oriented digital leader bringing senior management capabilities and 20 years of international management experience within AI Automation, Digital & Innovation Strategy, Process Optimisation, Agile Portfolio Management and Change Management. I work strategically as well as operationally across the organization and am accustomed to asking the right questions, bringing the right people together, creating trust, collaboration, and job satisfaction, and communicating clearly about strategy, goals, deliverables, and success criteria.

You get a colleague who is recognized as an ambitious, structured, strategic and proactive leader with experience in creating and gearing organizations for growth. I have successfully launched several products, participated in the commercialisation and go to market strategies as well as facilitated sales meetings. I have a solid personal drive that, combined with clear communication, decisiveness, and natural impact, makes things happen.

You gain a leader with a strong passion for people, good leadership, and a focus on creating an inclusive company culture that ensures a healthy work-life balance, where job satisfaction goes hand-in-hand with sustainable behavior, technological development, and visible commercial results. Throughout my career, I have worked with and led (directly/indirectly) management consultants, software developers, IT architects, project managers, and engineers. As a leader, I am appreciative, clear, decisive, and proactive, and effectively combine this with smiles, laughter, and humor.

I have a proven ability to translate complex technical concepts into business value — and vice versa. With a background spanning IT management, digital transformation, and business architecture, I speak both languages fluently, and I'm experienced in communicating the potential of advanced technology to C-level decision-makers across industries.
Client facing sales and business development

I bring hands-on commercial experience across the full customer journey — from initial contact, pitching, and scoping, to account management and long-term relationship building. I am comfortable owning the sales responsibility within my area and have a strong track record of winning complex, consultancy-based engagements and nurturing lasting client partnerships.

I have direct experience managing budgets, resources, and profitability in complex, multi-stakeholder project environments. I approach every engagement with a commercial mindset, knowing that sustainable growth is built on profitable delivery and long-term client partnerships — not just successful one-off projects.

I am a seasoned facilitator who excels at running customer workshops, uncovering the real business challenges beneath the surface, and converting them into concrete, scoped requirements and executable solutions. I bring structure and purpose to every client dialogue.

My track record spans banking, energy, logistics, insurance, media, and the public sector — across Denmark, Norway, Germany, Finland and the UK. I am used to quickly immersing myself in new business models and industries, and I thrive in environments where no two clients are the same.
People leadership with an empathetic approach

With 7+ years of people management experience leading highly specialised, multi-national teams, I understand that skilled professionals are motivated by autonomy, mastery, and psychological safety. I am a present and engaged leader who prioritises my team's wellbeing and professional development alongside delivery excellence.
ecuting go-to-market strategy across project delivery and product management and operations
Established the products and AI department to 17 team members from the ground up
Successfully launched 2 SaaS products with more than 600 BtB users
Achieved a 91st percentile GAIS employee satisfaction across all dimensions
Increased content development efficiency with 600 % using AI
Led migration of core platform in a highly operational insurance company

Successfully facilitated the outsourcing and transfer of the Open Shift Container Platform
Managed vendor relationships and internal stakeholders through a complex technical migration
Ensured 100% operational continuity of operations during platform transition

Delivered enterprise-wide implementation of the Camunda BPM platform - on time and on budget

Rebranded and remodelled the end-to-end process taxonomy for the entire organisation
Delivered a structured process framework used for onboarding new employees globally
Improved process transparency and knowledge transfer across international teams

Set up group wide portfolio governance model and strategy execution framework
Executed projects enabling integrated logistics across Maersk's global operations
Delivered the Business Capability Management framework globally
Led innovation strategy and portfolio management at group level

I was working within Danske Bank New Ventures to drive innovation through new products, services, partnerships and venture capital looking beyond traditional banking.
Setting up the execution of multiple Moonshots - from early stage exploration to building the products that potentially can act as the new revenue streams in the future.

Orchestrated and managed 5 simultaneous projects aimed at P&L optimisation
Delivered 15-20% improvements to profitability across the rental portfolio
Aligned cross-functional teams around a shared programme roadmap

# Program Manager / Interim Head of BPO, Banking, Denmark (Medium)
Identified and drove simplification initiatives across the Asset Management department
Led reorganisation of the department to improve efficiency
Stepped in as interim line manager of 6 team members, providing leadership stability during transition

Enabled end-to-end digitisation of mortgage processes
Delivered the business side of "Ny realkredit platform" — a flagship digital product
Streamlined customer-facing processes in a highly regulated banking environment

# Project Track Lead, Workforce Migration, Banking, Denmark/Norway/Sweden/UK (Very Large)
Migrated 3 Nordic operational service centres into 1 consolidated customer service HUB
Managed cross-border coordination across Denmark, Norway, Sweden, and the UK
Delivered 20% operational cost and complexity reduction through consolidation
Scope: Programme Manager across two major acquisition and integration projects
Executed Norlys' full acquisition and integration of STOFA including full customer data migration to Navision
Managed the IT integration workstream for Norlys' acquisition of Ørsteds onshore wind turbines
Scope: Programme Manager across 3 Nordic countries in a media/legal management organisation
Consolidated customer processes across 3 Nordic customer centres
Delivered a unified operational model improving efficiency and consistency across markets
Scope: Leading improvement projects within R&D Engineering.
Training and coaching managers and employees in Lean mindset, tools and techniques.

Led and delivered multiple improvement projects within the Siemens Wind Power R&D Engineering function
Trained and coached junior consultants, managers and employees in Lean Innovation mindset, tools, and techniques
Implemented Lean and Six Sigma methodology in a law enforcement context
Demonstrated versatility by successfully applying private sector methods to public sector operations

# General Manager, Logistics, Global (Large), 8 and 13 direct reports
Led a Business Intelligence team of Business Warehouse functional and technical specialists
Managed the SAP training and change management team for the global rollout of SAP FI/CO with significant impact on the overall change perception of the ERP roll-out
Delivered a global SAP implementation across multiple geographies as part of a major ERP transformation
